prompt: A hyper-realistic, intense, over-the-top illustration of three elderly people in a fiery, apocalyptic setting. In the foreground, two elderly DJs are intensely scratching on detailed turntables while screaming aggressively. On the left is an elderly woman with {argument name="woman's hair color" default="purple"} hair in a top bun. On the right is an elderly man with {argument name="man's hair style" default="spiky blonde punk hair"} and sunglasses. Between them in the background is a massive erupting {argument name="background element" default="volcano"} surrounded by roaring flames, flying sparks, and smoke. Looming at the top center of the image is a third elderly man with white hair and a beard, wearing a purple hoodie with the word "{argument name="hoodie text" default="KAMI"}" faintly visible, shouting with his hands raised making two-finger gestures against a backdrop of dark stormy clouds. Across the center of the image, hovering in front of the volcano, is large, jagged, neon graffiti-style text reading "{argument name="main text" default="DJBBA"}" in vibrant blue, green, and pink colors. The overall lighting is dramatic, illuminated by the intense orange and yellow glow of the fire.
translatedPrompt: 一张超写实、电影感且夸张的动作海报，画面中包含三个充满激情的角色。背景是 {argument name="background setting" default="一座喷发中的巨大火山，伴随着岩浆和火焰"}。在画面顶部中心，悬浮在烟雾缭绕的天空中，是 {argument name="top character" default="一位留着长白发和胡须、身穿灰色连帽衫的老人"}，他正在大声呐喊并双手比出胜利手势。在前景中，两个角色正全神贯注地在 DJ 打碟机上搓盘，两人都展现出极度狂热的能量。左侧是 {argument name="left character" default="一位扎着紫色发髻的老妇人"}。右侧是 {argument name="right character" default="一位留着金色尖刺莫霍克发型、戴着墨镜的老人"}。在画面中心、火山上方悬浮着巨大的锯齿状霓虹涂鸦风格文字，写着 "{argument name="main text" default="DJBBA"}"，色彩为鲜艳的蓝色、绿色和粉色。光影效果戏剧化、火热且混乱，火花和灰烬四处飞溅。

breakdown.creativeCore: 狂野老年 DJ 火山海报：生成一张电影感十足、夸张的动作海报，展现老年角色在喷发的火山前激情打碟，并配有霓虹涂鸦文字。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
